response.justification: The candidate brings 15+ years of broad software engineering experience and some relevant foundations (TypeScript, AWS CDK, data integration at Dunnhumby, recent MCP/agentic workflow exposure), but falls significantly short of the role's core requirements. Python is entirely absent from the skill set — a critical language for production AI systems. Substantive AI/GenAI work appears only in the most recent one-month position with no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation pipelines. The role demands 8+ years of production AI delivery; this resume reflects a strong generalist pivoting toward AI, not a seasoned AI engineer.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and agentic workflow frameworks directly matches a listed key technology
AWS CDK and microservices data-integration experience at Dunnhumby provides a relevant cloud and pipeline foundation
15+ year track record of shipping across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure domains demonstrates adaptability and engineering depth
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills list and employment history — it is the primary language for AI/ML engineering and a hard requirement
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance optimization, which are central technical competencies for the role
AI/GenAI experience is limited to approximately one month at the current position, far below the 8+ year production AI requirement

key_factors.factor: No RAG / vector DB / LLM experience
